Dear Fiancé, Here Are 10 Things I Won't Change About Myself After Getting Married!
I'm told that wives have to behave appropriately but I'm sorry.
I absolutely cannot promise that I won't ambush you with hugs and kisses no matter where we are.
So be prepared.
What is this growing up business?
I can't handle all this.
I'm an extremely passionate person who gets excited about little things.
I will drag you for movies I'm dying to watch, make elaborate date night plans, and will continue to make a big deal out of birthdays and anniversaries.
That's just how it is.
Capture your special moments in memorable photo frames available on Amazon for Rs 175.
There cannot be a bigger hint for you regarding what makes me happy.
I love random surprises.
So feel free to buy me flowers or pamper me with an impromptu trip!
Okay?
Okay!
My family and friends hold a huge, irreplaceable place in my heart and my life.
And to be totally honest, I wouldn't change it for the world.
I can't wait for you to get to know everyone and be an even bigger part of my world.
Make sure you are well organized at work and in life with the help of this diary available on Amazon for Rs 249.
I don't know if you know this yet, but I've been told my eyes sparkle every time I look at you.
I absolutely love the dimension you've added to my life and I promise to always cherish that.
I promise to always look at you like maybe you are magic.
I know that you are a progressive man and we have discussed how we both love what we do.
I promise to stay as motivated and passionate about my work as you are and absolutely know we are both going to kill it in life!
A calming massage session after a hard day at work?
Why not?
Get this lavender infused massage oil on Nykaa for Rs 280 only!
Come on, you know this about me!
I am addicted to TV.
And we all know this will come up at some point so let's just discuss it now.
You are going to have to compromise your TV privileges, because you are about to marry an addict.
Okay, good that that's out of the way.
8.
I will not change how I feel about game night!
I am super competitive and won't change that about myself just because we are getting married.
'game night' means each man for himself.
Oh, and I absolutely LOVE winning.
Popcorns are mandatory during game night, right?
Get your pack of yummy chocolate flavoured popcorn on Amazon for Rs 189.
You know I'm the kind of person who always keeps it real.
Just because we are getting married, I will not suddenly become politically correct.
That's right.
With me, you'll always get 100% authentic and honest.
Promise!
Okay, maybe this one isn't all that true.
Because the love I have for you only keeps growing.
I guess that means that it'll change, right?
Surprise him with a fabulously cooked homemade meal with the help of this cookbook.
Get it on Amazon for Rs 379.

This is a Sirian lion girl.
She is a sweet young kitten.
Her feline humanoid race dwell in the light.
they have; are now transforming towards the light.

The Shedim are not afraid of us.
There is no power short of Adonai which can hold them.
The Utukku are safe behind the veil.
Their Kings celebrate our suffering in the hidden lands.
The Rabisu know they can feed upon us and live forever.
The Jinn know their power and revel in it.
dusty rocks?
The littlest sound, it is.
The Shedim are made of smoke and fire and their world is the same.
millennia we fought our primitive fights.
Even now we barely live.
invisible places where we cannot see.
and only then, will the joke finally end.
years in the dirt.
I could tell you of children who followed.
share the anguish and outrage that plagued my soul, but no.
laughter can.
Hawwa will speak the word soon, and... you'll see!
heart will fill your throats and you too will be Sara, then.
stars.
Laugh at the dogs in their costumes.
Hah!
phrases were memorized and repeated as we do with scripture today.

We provide a number of outdoor stages or hire services.
Covered in stages are essential if your event is outside, given the weather we have!
We can meet you at the location the stage is to go and we can assess the site, discuss your needs and find a solution that works for you.
Our outdoor stage can come with audio and lighting or you can supply your own.
We also offer crowd safety barriers (also known as mojo barriers).
We supply our trailer stage options all over the country for many types of events.
We have 2 sizes to choose from depending on your budget and the nature of your event.
Performance area is 8m x 6.5m, and for bigger events you can add on the extended PA wings giving you a 12m stage frontage.
These are ideal for larger events and ideal for branding.
We can also offer drum kit and keyboard risers with all our stages.
If you are a performer or band who likes to interact with their audience, we can provide a ramp going into the crowd.
Just ask for details.
We have a wide range of outdoor stage hire & crowd control solutions available.
However, with every turnkey product and as every event hire is different, sometimes flexible staging solutions are required.
Our stage platforms give you complete flexibility in your choice of stage size and height.
Choose an open air or a covered option, single level or tiered option with wheelchair ramps.
Stage & Lighting can build your outdoor stage design!
27m2 stage area with various height ground support.
The newest edition to the family!
This provides the ideal solution for various applications.
Ideal for small street concerts where set up time is restricted, street festivals, community events and as a VIP viewing platform.

The Rising Star Award is awarded to a young professional with 7 or fewer years of experience who has shown great commitment to the profession and community.
More information on this event is available here.

Create your own pattern and hollow fill for edible dessert cups that will stand out on any table.
Create the Flower Dessert Cup, then fill with your favorite ice cream or mousse.
I need these for an event and they work out perfect.
Can't wait to use this to mold chocolate into edible cups to hold chocolate mousse!
